Cheat Menu

Client mode — cheats disabled
Dev only · commands run on the local player controller via the console.

TARGET PLAYER

Most cheats accept a 1-based player number. Defaults to player 1.

GAMEPLAY CHEATS

RESPAWN

"Keep Items" prevents tombstone spawn on next death for the target player.
